title: oreoseris gossypina
intro: Oreoseris gossypina, also known as the cottonball plant, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Oreoseris gossypina include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and alleviate digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are commonly used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are then used to harness its medicinal properties.
